summary: Cleanio - a two-wheeler doorstep service app with services: Full Service (₹899 upto 200cc, ₹1199 above 200cc), Repair, and Cleaning (Colour Foam Washing ₹199, Normal Foam Washing ₹149). Includes an AI chatbot to diagnose repair issues. Bookings can be assigned to a mechanic, visible to both customer and admin.
architectural_notes: Brand name: Cleanio - two-wheeler doorstep service app
AI chatbot integrated for repair issue diagnosis (electrical, brake, bike not starting, etc.)
Cleaning service has two pricing tiers: Colour Foam Washing ₹199, Normal Foam Washing ₹149
Mechanic name field added to bookings, displayed to both customer and admin

existing_features.title: Build a landing/home page with the brand name 'Cleanio' prominently displayed, a tagline about doorstep two-wheeler services, and clear navigation to the three service options: Full Service, Repair, and Cleaning.

Implement a Full Service booking flow. The user selects their engine capacity: 'Upto 200cc' (₹899) or 'Above 200cc' (₹1199). The price must be dynamically displayed based on the selection. The form collects customer name, phone number, address, and preferred time slot before submitting the booking.

Implement a Repair booking flow that launches an AI-style conversational chatbot UI. The bot must interactively ask the customer about their repair issue through a series of guided questions (e.g., 'What issue are you facing?' with quick-reply options: Electrical Issue, Brake Problem, Bike Not Starting, Engine Noise, Other). Based on selection it asks follow-up questions to gather details. At the end the collected issue summary is pre-filled into the booking form (name, phone, address, time slot) for submission.
Implement a Cleaning booking flow. Display the available cleaning service description. Collect customer name, phone number, address, vehicle type, and preferred time slot, then submit to the backend.
Create a simple admin/bookings page that lists all submitted bookings with their details and status. Allow status updates (Pending → Confirmed → Completed) from this view.

Apply a bold, energetic visual theme consistent with the 'Cleanio' brand: use a high-contrast color palette of deep charcoal and electric orange as the primary accent, clean sans-serif typography, card-based layouts, and smooth micro-interactions. Maintain this design consistently across all pages including the chatbot UI.

Replace the existing logo in the header/navbar with the newly uploaded scooter-with-pin logo image (cleanio-logo.png), displayed inline beside the 'Cleanio' wordmark. The logo must be sized proportionally to fit the header height and must appear on all pages via the Layout component.

Update the Cleaning booking flow to offer two washing sub-options: 'Colour Foam Washing' at ₹199 and 'Normal Foam Washing' at ₹149. The user must select one of these options before submitting; the selected option and its price must be displayed dynamically and stored with the booking. Update the backend Booking type to capture the cleaning sub-option field.

Add a mechanic name field to the booking data model and admin interface. On the admin bookings page, allow an admin to assign or edit a mechanic name for any booking. The assigned mechanic name must be stored in the backend. On the customer-facing booking confirmation page, display the assigned mechanic name if one has been set.

In the Layout component header, place the user-uploaded bike logo image to the left of the 'Cleanio' wordmark. The logo image must be rendered as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/cleanio-logo.png, sized proportionally to fit the header height, and displayed inline beside the brand name on all pages.

new_feature_requests.summary: Full Service option: ₹899 for upto 200cc, ₹1199 for above 200cc
Repair service option with AI chatbot to diagnose issues (electrical, brake, bike not starting, etc.)
AI bot for repair issue diagnosis - asks customer about issues like electrical, brake, bike not starting, etc.
Doorstep service booking flow for two-wheelers

Create a Motoko backend actor that stores service bookings. Each booking must capture: customer name, phone number, address, vehicle type (scooter/motorcycle), engine capacity (upto 200cc or above 200cc), selected service (Full Service, Repair, Cleaning), repair issue details (if Repair selected), and booking status (Pending, Confirmed, Completed). Expose CRUD endpoints: createBooking, getBookings, updateBookingStatus.
Update logo placement: show new logo image beside the 'Cleanio' brand wordmark
Cleaning service: add two sub-options — Colour Foam Washing (₹199) and Normal Foam Washing (₹149)
Add mechanic name assignment to bookings, visible to both customer and admin
